prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 83.2 kg; Height 178.5 cm; BMI 26.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.8%), FPG (12 months ago 244mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 221mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.1kg; 9 months ago 84.9kg; 6 months ago 80.2kg; 3 months ago 80.1kg; current 83.2kg), Height (12 months ago 178.5cm; 9 months ago 178.5cm; 6 months ago 178.5cm; 3 months ago 178.5cm; current 178.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 145mmHg; 9 months ago 142mmHg; 6 months ago 147mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 57U/L; 9 months ago 50U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 52U/L), AST (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 103U/L; 6 months ago 100U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 99U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 120mg/g; 9 months ago 157mg/g; 6 months ago 107mg/g; 3 months ago 104mg/g; current 195mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 40mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 120mg/dL; 6 months ago 103mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
